name: JellyFed
description: JellyFed connects multiple Jellyfin servers together. Libraries from federated instances appear as native items — with artwork, metadata and direct streaming — in any Jellyfin client, without modification.

versions.changelog: [Main release] Integrate the v1 foundation, discovery/admin control, audit logs, multi-source provenance, native player-side source selection for movies and series episodes via IMediaSourceProvider, and a unified /JellyFed API with explicit version reporting plus non-blocking peer mismatch warnings.
[Main release] Reconcile temp branch onto main: advanced peers UI, per-peer roots (movies/series/anime), peer-level sync/admin flows, and updated docs.
